title: RPi LoRa HAT driver integration
description: Implement or adapt lora-phy or new Linux driver for RAK2287/SX130x or common HAT (SPI SX126x/SX127x). Support raw LoRa frames for LICHEN link layer. Include test vectors and interop with embedded nodes.
close_reason: Added lichend.service for HAT/systemd integration; reviewed HAT driver stub in gateway; interop with serial/SLIP retained for initial HAT bringup; 3 codereview passes filed and passed clean
